portwatch_chokepoints.note: Daily AIS-derived tanker counts. Anomaly = 7-day mean below threshold vs pre-crisis baseline OR 30d avg (ports avg>=5). T6-S45: 7d mean (was single-day, smooths ~5d feed lag) + strategic ports alert at -40% (0.60), others -50% (0.50).

items.title: India Urges Shipowners to Avoid Deploying Nationals on Hormuz Voyages
items.summary: India has advised ship owners and managers to avoid hiring Indian nationals on vessels they plan to send through the Strait of Hormuz, as attacks on commercial vessels have intensified in the area since the U.S.-Iran ceasefire all but collapsed. I...

items.title: India Hikes Diesel and Jet Fuel Export Tax
items.summary: India has hiked the export duties it will be charging on exports of diesel and jet fuel for the two weeks starting July 16, as the return of the Hormuz crisis is set to further tighten fuel markets. The export taxes on diesel and aviation fuel wer...

items.title: IEA Warns World Has Just Weeks to Avoid Hormuz Economic Shock
items.summary: The world has just a few weeks before taking an economic toll from the re-escalation in the Middle East and the new halt to tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, according to Fatih Birol, the Executive Director of the International Energy A...

items.title: U.S. Strikes Iran-Linked Tanker Near Kharg Island
items.summary: U.S. forces have struck and disabled an Iran-linked sanctioned oil tanker near Iran’s key export terminal, Kharg Island, deep in the Persian Gulf, the U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) said early on Thursday, as the U.S. appears to be broadening the...

items.title: As Ukraine Cripples Russian Refining, Global Diesel Markets Pay the Price
items.summary: Since March, Ukraine has systematically dismantled Russia’s refining system, driving crude processing to its lowest level in 21 years and forcing Moscow to ban exports of gasoline, jet fuel and diesel. Russian refineries processed an average of 3....

items.title: AI Boom Sends U.S. Electricity Demand to New High
items.summary: U.S. electricity consumption set a new record high last year and is on track for new all-time highs this year and next, as the AI boom has ended America’s decade of stagnant power use. Rising electrification rates are partly responsible for the hi...

items.title: Five Oil and Gas Stocks Ready for a Hormuz Spike and a Hawkish Fed
items.summary: Two shocks are hitting energy investors at once, and they point in opposite directions. The first is obvious. Iran’s Revolutionary Guard declared the Strait of Hormuz closed again on July 11, the U.S. answered with three straight nights of strikes...

items.title: U.S. Strikes Iran Again as Brent Slips Despite Escalating Conflict
items.summary: The oil market is treating another US-Iran escalation as background noise. The U.S. launched another wave of strikes against Iran on Wednesday, expanding attacks on military targets along the country's southern coast. Brent crude barely flinched....

items.title: China Just Connected the World's Biggest Hybrid Solar Plant to the Grid
items.summary: The face of energy security is changing. Historically, fossil fuels have represented security thanks to their established supply chains and round-the-clock production potential, while renewable energies represented risk and variability. But that e...

items.title: World-First Floating Wind Technology to Help Power Oil Rigs
items.summary: It’s not often that wind power and oil and gas are mentioned in the same breath. The rare occasion concerns a new type of offshore wind turbine launched in China that will power the extraction of fossil fuels by offshore oil platforms. Developed b...

items.title: China Expands Energy and Trade Partnerships in Central Asia
items.summary: The chairman of Kazakhstan’s Atomic Energy Agency, Almassadam Satkaliyev, is on an extended tour of nuclear-power facilities in China, gaining insight into PRC management techniques covering the entire development cycle, from designing to construc...

items.title: Five Ways China Is Shielding Itself as the Hormuz Cease-Fire Collapses
items.summary: The U.S.-Iran cease-fire that was supposed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz for good is falling apart. American forces reimposed a naval blockade on Iranian ports this week and hit dozens of targets along Iran's coast, and Tehran answered by strikin...

thermometer.ethical_notes: Public posts only · No PII storage · ≥3 sources required for alert · 24h cooldown · alerts NEVER replace official sources · TOS-compliant

comunicacoes.label: Comunicacoes
comunicacoes.note: Tema severamente sub-instrumentado: 1 de 4+ indicadores presentes.

defesa.label: Defesa
defesa.note: Tema severamente sub-instrumentado: incendios e o gap mais critico (PT/Norte alto risco).

themes.note: Decomposicao em 8 temas da enciclopedia (T6-S26). Score=None quando dados insuficientes. Anti-synthetic: nao fabrica scores. Cada tema lista gaps_to_close_priority com APIs livres a integrar em S27+.
